name: pnp-spfx-copilot-apps-apps-directory
title: Apps directory
longDescription: Apps directory brings your organisation's full application catalogue into Microsoft 365 Copilot. Browse apps by category, search by name or keyword, mark your most-used apps as favourites for quick access, and launch any app directly from the Copilot chat. You can also add custom app shortcuts and filter the directory to show only your personal favourites.

thumbnails.alt: Inline Apps directory card in the Copilot canvas

thumbnails.name: screenshot-dark.png
thumbnails.alt: Apps directory full-screen view in dark mode

references.description: Extend Microsoft 365 Copilot with declarative agents, plugins, and connectors to tailor Copilot to your organization's needs.

references.name: Overview of the SharePoint Framework
references.description: The SharePoint Framework (SPFx) is a page and web part model that provides full support for client-side SharePoint development.

references.description: Hands-on lab for building SharePoint Copilot Apps using the SPFx Copilot component model.
